\tzpentry{ID4593}{Wess-Zumino-Witten Action Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4593 introduces Wess-Zumino-Witten Action Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{S}_{\text{WZW}} = \frac{k}{8\pi} \int_{\mathcal{M}} \text{Tr}(g^{-1} dg)^3 \end{equation}
